explanation: The video captures a cyclist riding on a pedestrian pathway where two pedestrians are walking, which is highly anomalous for this setting as the path is likely designated for pedestrian use only. The situation starts in snippet 5 when a cyclist begins to appear on the path and persists until snippet 18 with varying levels of proximity to the pedestrians, reaching peak anomaly scores when the cyclist is most near to the individuals. This deviation from normal behavior, indicated by the high anomaly scores in frames 7 to 18, is primarily due to the unexpected and potentially unsafe mix of cycling in a pedestrian area.
